verses.4: Qala rabbi innee wahana alAAathmu minnee waishtaAAala alrrasu shayban walam akun biduAAaika rabbi shaqiyyan
verses.5: Wainnee khiftu almawaliya min waraee wakanati imraatee AAaqiran fahab lee min ladunka waliyyan
verses.6: Yarithunee wayarithu min ali yaAAqooba waijAAalhu rabbi radiyyan
verses.7: Ya zakariyya inna nubashshiruka bighulamin ismuhu yahya lam najAAal lahu min qablu samiyyan
verses.8: Qala rabbi anna yakoonu lee ghulamun wakanati imraatee AAaqiran waqad balaghtu mina alkibari AAitiyyan
verses.9: Qala kathalika qala rabbuka huwa AAalayya hayyinun waqad khalaqtuka min qablu walam taku shayan
verses.10: Qala rabbi ijAAal lee ayatan qala ayatuka alla tukallima alnnasa thalatha layalin sawiyyan
verses.11: Fakharaja AAala qawmihi mina almihrabi faawha ilayhim an sabbihoo bukratan waAAashiyyan
verses.12: Ya yahya khuthi alkitaba biquwwatin waataynahu alhukma sabiyyan
verses.13: Wahananan min ladunna wazakatan wakana taqiyyan
verses.14: Wabarran biwalidayhi walam yakun jabbaran AAasiyyan
verses.15: Wasalamun AAalayhi yawma wulida wayawma yamootu wayawma yubAAathu hayyan
verses.16: Waothkur fee alkitabi maryama ithi intabathat min ahliha makanan sharqiyyan
verses.17: Faittakhathat min doonihim hijaban faarsalna ilayha roohana fatamaththala laha basharan sawiyyan
verses.18: Qalat innee aAAoothu bialrrahmani minka in kunta taqiyyan
verses.19: Qala innama ana rasoolu rabbiki liahaba laki ghulaman zakiyyan
verses.20: Qalat anna yakoonu lee ghulamun walam yamsasnee basharun walam aku baghiyyan
verses.21: Qala kathaliki qala rabbuki huwa AAalayya hayyinun walinajAAalahu ayatan lilnnasi warahmatan minna wakana amran maqdiyyan
verses.23: Faajaaha almakhadu ila jithAAi alnnakhlati qalat ya laytanee mittu qabla hatha wakuntu nasyan mansiyyan
verses.24: Fanadaha min tahtiha alla tahzanee qad jaAAala rabbuki tahtaki sariyyan
verses.25: Wahuzzee ilayki bijithAAi alnnakhlati tusaqit AAalayki rutaban janiyyan
verses.26: Fakulee waishrabee waqarree AAaynan faimma tarayinna mina albashari ahadan faqoolee innee nathartu lilrrahmani sawman falan okallima alyawma insiyyan
verses.27: Faatat bihi qawmaha tahmiluhu qaloo ya maryamu laqad jiti shayan fariyyan
verses.28: Ya okhta haroona ma kana abooki imraa sawin wama kanat ommuki baghiyyan
verses.29: Faasharat ilayhi qaloo kayfa nukallimu man kana fee almahdi sabiyyan
verses.30: Qala innee AAabdu Allahi ataniya alkitaba wajaAAalanee nabiyyan
verses.31: WajaAAalanee mubarakan ayna ma kuntu waawsanee bialssalati waalzzakati ma dumtu hayyan
verses.32: Wabarran biwalidatee walam yajAAalnee jabbaran shaqiyyan
verses.33: Waalssalamu AAalayya yawma wulidtu wayawma amootu wayawma obAAathu hayyan
verses.34: Thalika AAeesa ibnu maryama qawla alhaqqi allathee feehi yamtaroona
verses.35: Ma kana lillahi an yattakhitha min waladin subhanahu itha qada amran fainnama yaqoolu lahu kun fayakoonu
verses.36: Wainna Allaha rabbee warabbukum faoAAbudoohu hatha siratun mustaqeemun
verses.37: Faikhtalafa alahzabu min baynihim fawaylun lillatheena kafaroo min mashhadi yawmin AAatheemin
verses.38: AsmiAA bihim waabsir yawma yatoonana lakini alththalimoona alyawma fee dalalin mubeenin
verses.39: Waanthirhum yawma alhasrati ith qudiya alamru wahum fee ghaflatin wahum la yuminoona
verses.40: Inna nahnu narithu alarda waman AAalayha wailayna yurjaAAoona
verses.41: Waothkur fee alkitabi ibraheema innahu kana siddeeqan nabiyyan
verses.42: Ith qala liabeehi ya abati lima taAAbudu ma la yasmaAAu wala yubsiru wala yughnee AAanka shayan
verses.43: Ya abati innee qad jaanee mina alAAilmi ma lam yatika faittabiAAnee ahdika siratan sawiyyan
verses.44: Ya abati la taAAbudi alshshaytana inna alshshaytana kana lilrrahmani AAasiyyan
verses.45: Ya abati innee akhafu an yamassaka AAathabun mina alrrahmani fatakoona lilshshyatani waliyyan
verses.46: Qala araghibun anta AAan alihatee ya ibraheemu lain lam tantahi laarjumannaka waohjurnee maliyyan
verses.47: Qala salamun AAalayka saastaghfiru laka rabbee innahu kana bee hafiyyan
verses.48: WaaAAtazilukum wama tadAAoona min dooni Allahi waadAAoo rabbee AAasa alla akoona biduAAai rabbee shaqiyyan
verses.49: Falamma iAAtazalahum wama yaAAbudoona min dooni Allahi wahabna lahu ishaqa wayaAAqooba wakullan jaAAalna nabiyyan
verses.50: Wawahabna lahum min rahmatina wajaAAalna lahum lisana sidqin AAaliyyan
verses.51: Waothkur fee alkitabi moosa innahu kana mukhlasan wakana rasoolan nabiyyan
verses.52: Wanadaynahu min janibi alttoori alaymani waqarrabnahu najiyyan
verses.53: Wawahabna lahu min rahmatina akhahu haroona nabiyyan
verses.54: Waothkur fee alkitabi ismaAAeela innahu kana sadiqa alwaAAdi wakana rasoolan nabiyyan
verses.55: Wakana yamuru ahlahu bialssalati waalzzakati wakana AAinda rabbihi mardiyyan
verses.56: Waothkur fee alkitabi idreesa innahu kana siddeeqan nabiyyan
verses.58: Olaika allatheena anAAama Allahu AAalayhim mina alnnabiyyeena min thurriyyati adama wamimman hamalna maAAa noohin wamin thurriyyati ibraheema waisraeela wamimman hadayna waijtabayna itha tutla AAalayhim ayatu alrrahmani kharroo sujjadan wabukiyyan
verses.59: Fakhalafa min baAAdihim khalfun adaAAoo alssalata waittabaAAoo alshshahawati fasawfa yalqawna ghayyan
verses.60: Illa man taba waamana waAAamila salihan faolaika yadkhuloona aljannata wala yuthlamoona shayan
verses.61: Jannati AAadnin allatee waAAada alrrahmanu AAibadahu bialghaybi innahu kana waAAduhu matiyyan
verses.62: La yasmaAAoona feeha laghwan illa salaman walahum rizquhum feeha bukratan waAAashiyyan
verses.63: Tilka aljannatu allatee noorithu min AAibadina man kana taqiyyan
verses.64: Wama natanazzalu illa biamri rabbika lahu ma bayna aydeena wama khalfana wama bayna thalika wama kana rabbuka nasiyyan
verses.65: Rabbu alssamawati waalardi wama baynahuma faoAAbudhu waistabir liAAibadatihi hal taAAlamu lahu samiyyan
verses.66: Wayaqoolu alinsanu aitha ma mittu lasawfa okhraju hayyan
verses.67: Awala yathkuru alinsanu anna khalaqnahu min qablu walam yaku shayan
verses.68: Fawarabbika lanahshurannahum waalshshayateena thumma lanuhdirannahum hawla jahannama jithiyyan
verses.69: Thumma lananziAAanna min kulli sheeAAatin ayyuhum ashaddu AAala alrrahmani AAitiyyan
verses.70: Thumma lanahnu aAAlamu biallatheena hum awla biha siliyyan
verses.71: Wain minkum illa wariduha kana AAala rabbika hatman maqdiyyan
verses.72: Thumma nunajjee allatheena ittaqaw wanatharu alththalimeena feeha jithiyyan
verses.73: Waitha tutla AAalayhim ayatuna bayyinatin qala allatheena kafaroo lillatheena amanoo ayyu alfareeqayni khayrun maqaman waahsanu nadiyyan
verses.74: Wakam ahlakna qablahum min qarnin hum ahsanu athathan wariyan
verses.75: Qul man kana fee alddalalati falyamdud lahu alrrahmanu maddan hatta itha raaw ma yooAAadoona imma alAAathaba waimma alssaAAata fasayaAAlamoona man huwa sharrun makanan waadAAafu jundan
verses.76: Wayazeedu Allahu allatheena ihtadaw hudan waalbaqiyatu alssalihatu khayrun AAinda rabbika thawaban wakhayrun maraddan
verses.77: Afaraayta allathee kafara biayatina waqala laootayanna malan wawaladan
verses.78: AttalaAAa alghayba ami ittakhatha AAinda alrrahmani AAahdan
verses.79: Kalla sanaktubu ma yaqoolu wanamuddu lahu mina alAAathabi maddan
verses.81: Waittakhathoo min dooni Allahi alihatan liyakoonoo lahum AAizzan
verses.82: Kalla sayakfuroona biAAibadatihim wayakoonoona AAalayhim diddan
verses.83: Alam tara anna arsalna alshshayateena AAala alkafireena taozzuhum azzan
verses.84: Fala taAAjal AAalayhim innama naAAuddu lahum AAaddan
verses.85: Yawma nahshuru almuttaqeena ila alrrahmani wafdan
verses.87: La yamlikoona alshshafaAAata illa mani ittakhatha AAinda alrrahmani AAahdan
verses.90: Takadu alssamawatu yatafattarna minhu watanshaqqu alardu watakhirru aljibalu haddan
verses.92: Wama yanbaghee lilrrahmani an yattakhitha waladan
verses.93: In kullu man fee alssamawati waalardi illa atee alrrahmani AAabdan
verses.96: Inna allatheena amanoo waAAamiloo alssalihati sayajAAalu lahumu alrrahmanu wuddan
verses.97: Fainnama yassarnahu bilisanika litubashshira bihi almuttaqeena watunthira bihi qawman luddan
verses.98: Wakam ahlakna qablahum min qarnin hal tuhissu minhum min ahadin aw tasmaAAu lahum rikzan
